sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.description: Creates a new warranty claim record. The agent asks for user approval in instructions before calling this tool.
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.inputs: [{"name":"customer","value":"","description":"Customer company sys_id","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"device","value":"","description":"Device sys_id","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"caller_name","value":"","description":"Caller name","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"claim_reason","value":"","description":"Reason for warranty claim","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"state","value":"","description":"State (1=New)","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"priority","value":"","description":"Priority (1-4)","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"short_description","value":"","description":"Brief summary","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"customer_name","value":"","description":"Customer display name","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"device_serial_number","value":"","description":"Device serial number","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"device_name","value":"","description":"Device display name","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"crudInputs","value":{"operation":"create","table":{"value":"x_snc_medwc_auto_0_warranty_claim","displayValue":"x_snc_medwc_auto_0_warranty_claim"},"fieldValues":[{"field":{"id":"customer","sublabel":"customer","excludedOperators":[],"label":"customer","type":"reference","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"customer"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{customer}}"}},{"field":{"id":"device","sublabel":"device","excludedOperators":[],"label":"device","type":"reference","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"device"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{device}}"}},{"field":{"id":"caller_name","sublabel":"caller_name","excludedOperators":[],"label":"caller_name","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"caller_name"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{caller_name}}"}},{"field":{"id":"claim_reason","sublabel":"claim_reason","excludedOperators":[],"label":"claim_reason","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"claim_reason"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{claim_reason}}"}},{"field":{"id":"state","sublabel":"state","excludedOperators":[],"label":"state","type":"choice","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"state"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{state}}"}},{"field":{"id":"priority","sublabel":"priority","excludedOperators":[],"label":"priority","type":"integer","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"priority"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{priority}}"}},{"field":{"id":"short_description","sublabel":"short_description","excludedOperators":[],"label":"short_description","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"short_description"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{short_description}}"}},{"field":{"id":"customer_name","sublabel":"customer_name","excludedOperators":[],"label":"customer_name","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"customer_name"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{customer_name}}"}},{"field":{"id":"device_serial_number","sublabel":"device_serial_number","excludedOperators":[],"label":"device_serial_number","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"device_serial_number"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{device_serial_number}}"}},{"field":{"id":"device_name","sublabel":"device_name","excludedOperators":[],"label":"device_name","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"device_name"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{device_name}}"}}],"returnFields":[{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"sys_id","label":"sys_id","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"sys_id","sublabel":"sys_id"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"number","label":"number","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"number","sublabel":"number"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"state","label":"state","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"state","sublabel":"state"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"priority","label":"priority","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"priority","sublabel":"priority"}],"limit":"1"},"description":"Create operation configuration","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null}]
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.name: Create Warranty Claim
